rationale: The skill explores a codebase to find architectural improvements, requiring broad read access to source files, CONTEXT.md, and ADRs in docs/adr/. It writes to CONTEXT.md (adding/sharpening domain terms) and may create new ADR files in docs/adr/ when the user rejects candidates with load-bearing reasons. No network calls or subprocess invocations are implied — exploration is delegated to Claude's Agent/Explore tooling, not external binaries. No deletions are described.
